items.title: Andrew Luck: Eric Ebron’s comments regarding Chris Ballard ‘without merit’
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS — Andrew Luck begs to differ with Eric Ebron. items.title: NFL probe finds no reason to discipline Chiefs' Rice
items.summary: The NFL announced Friday that it concluded its own investigation into Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice, stating that he "has not engaged in conduct that violates the personal conduct policy."

items.summary: As the NFL’s nine-week offseason program is set to begin in April, the Indianapolis Colts have a structured path moving forward into the 2026 season. items.summary: On Thursday, two former Indianapolis Colts defenders retired as both linebacker Anthony Walker Jr. and cornerback Stephon Gilmore decided to hang up the professional football cleats for good. Originally a 2017 5th round pick of the Colts out of Northwestern, Walker Jr. would appear in 57 career games, making 48 over starts over his first […]

items.title: Indianapolis Colts Best Remaining Free Agent Options: Edge Rusher
items.summary: After losing Kwity Paye and Samson Ebukam in free agency and missing out to Baltimore on Trey Hendrickson, the Indianapolis Colts defensive line needs fresh impact on the edge. items.title: Former Colts WR T.Y. Hilton announces retirement from NFL
items.summary: Hilton, who spent a decade in Indianapolis, ranks third in Colts history in receptions (631) and receiving yards (9,691).

items.title: Colts sign free agent WR Nick Westbrook-Ikhine
items.summary: Westbrook-Ikhine played at Indiana University and has spent six seasons in the NFL with the Tennessee Titans (2024-24) and Miami Dolphins (2025).
